# Casa Trini Formentera

> Casa Trini is a rustic holiday villa on the island of Formentera (Balearic Islands, Spain), 500 m from the sea. It sleeps 1 to 8 guests across two independent wings, with 4 en-suite bedrooms, a 16×6 m freshwater pool and a 6,500 m² private walled garden. Booking is via Airbnb or by direct enquiry.

## Key facts
- Type: rustic self-catering holiday villa (whole property), family-run
- Location: Venda de Porto Sale, near Sant Francesc Xavier (the island capital), Formentera, Balearic Islands, Spain
- Coordinates: 38.7126, 1.4089
- Distances: 500 m to the sea (a 10-minute walk); ~1 km to Sant Francesc; ~1.5 km to La Savina port; ~2 km to Cala Saona beach; ~3 km to the natural park (Ses Illetes & Levante)
- Capacity: 1 to 8 guests — adaptable, thanks to two independent wings; suits solo travellers, couples, families and groups
- Bedrooms: 4, each with a private en-suite bathroom
- Pool: 16×6 m freshwater, up to 2 m deep, with sun loungers
- Garden: 6,500 m² private, fully enclosed, with pines and Mediterranean plants; four covered terraces
- Kitchen: fully equipped indoor kitchen, a living room, and an outdoor barbecue/kitchen
- Family-friendly: children's playground and open lawn; pets are not allowed
- Season: typically open May to October (October is still warm enough for the beach)
- Booking: listed on Airbnb only (not on Booking.com), or by direct enquiry; prices vary by season and number of guests (available on request)
- Languages: website in Spanish (default), English, German, Italian, French and Swedish

## Contact
- Phone / WhatsApp: +34 616 612 035
- Email: franciscoformentera2019@hotmail.com
- Website: https://casatriniformentera.com/
- Airbnb: https://www.airbnb.com/rooms/648870699251352349
- Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/casatriniformentera/
- Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/100093571307594

## Discover Formentera (guide / blog)
Practical island guides, available in all six languages, indexed at https://casatriniformentera.com/blog/en/ — topics include how to get to Formentera, the island's beaches and natural park, when the season runs, the Wednesday market (mercadillo), traditional Formentera food, Ibiza nightlife and getting back, and local traditions.
